privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a synthetically generated CSV file dynamically injected via setup_task.sh at /home/ga/Documents/VicidialData/new_areacodes.csv. It is verified that the generated CSV contains exactly three records for area codes 324 (Florida, Jacksonville Overlay), 729 (Tennessee, Chattanooga Overlay), and 839 (South Carolina, Columbia Overlay), all matching the metadata expected values for Country Code (1), GMT Offset (-5.00), and DST (Y).
